title: Sand Blaster Daily Checklist

sections.name: General Appearance
items: Is the Sand Blaster visually in good condition and clean.
Is the area around the Sand Blaster free from any obstructions.

sections.name: Mechanical / Electrical
items: Where Applicable are Electrical Cabinets free from Dust.

sections.name: Safety
items: Is there are Risk Assessment in place for the operation.
Is appropriate PPE Available and worn at all times.

notes: Filename says Bead Blaster, document text says Sand Blaster.
